edges.source: Revolutionary Forces of the G9 Family and Allies
descriptions: Zoe Nation is listed as an ally of G9 in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Zoe Pound , Zoe Nation, Zoe Mafia Family

descriptions: Los Charlines are allied with the Corleonesi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Medellin Cartel , Cali Cartel , Clan del Golfo , Corleonesi clan , Nuova Camorra Organizzata , Sinaloa Cartel

descriptions: Infobox lists Jewish Defense League as an enemy.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Liga de defensa Judía

descriptions: The Aryan Brotherhood lists the Jewish Defense League as an enemy.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Hermandad Aria de Texas, Black Guerrilla Family, Black P. Stones, D.C. Blacks, Bloods, Crips, SHARP, Nuestra Familia, las Panteras Negras, Liga de defensa Judía

South Pacific Cartel.description: Mexican organized crime group based in Morelos, formed in April 2010 by Héctor Beltrán Leyva from remnants of the Beltrán-Leyva Cartel. Engaged in drug trafficking, kidnapping, and murder. Significantly less active since mid-2011 after leaders were captured.

descriptions: The South Pacific Cartel was a short-lived cell created by the Beltrán-Leyva Organization.
edges.evidence_quote: Héctor Beltrán Leyva created a short-lived cell or branch in Morelos state called South Pacific Cartel

descriptions: South Pacific Cartel is a faction from Beltrán-Leyva Cartel breakup.
edges.evidence_quote: the organization broke apart into smaller factions: the South Pacific Cartel

descriptions: Pacific Sur Cartel is a branch of Beltrán Leyva.
edges.evidence_quote: El Cártel del Pacífico Sur es una rama del debilitado Cartel Beltrán-Leyva.

descriptions: Guerreros Unidos initiated a dispute with Cartel del Pacífico Sur.
edges.evidence_quote: Finalmente en 2011, El Tilde funda Guerreros Unidos e inicia una disputa con otros cárteles emergentes del extinto Cártel de los Beltrán Leyva conocidos como el Cartel del Pacífico Sur, La Mano con Ojos y Los Rojos, organizaciones que desaparecieron posteriormente.

descriptions: Mexican cartels including South Pacific Cartel smuggle cocaine into Canada via Port of Vancouver, likely involving Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: a number of Mexican cartels such as the Sinaloa Cartel, Los Zetas, the Knights Templar Cartel and the South Pacific Cartel are smuggling cocaine into Canada via the port of Vancouver.

descriptions: Infobox lists Beltrán-Leyva Cartel as an ally of South Pacific Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Beltrán-Leyva Cartel

descriptions: South Pacific Cartel is composed of remnants of Beltrán-Leyva Cartel, indicating a structural successor relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: The South Pacific Cartel ... is a Mexican organized crime group composed of the remnants of the Beltrán-Leyva Cartel.

descriptions: Infobox lists Gulf Cartel as a rival of South Pacific Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Sinaloa Cartel , Gulf Cartel

descriptions: Infobox lists Los Mazatlecos as an ally of South Pacific Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Beltrán-Leyva Cartel , Los Zetas , Los Mazatlecos

descriptions: Infobox lists Los Zetas as an ally of South Pacific Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Beltrán-Leyva Cartel , Los Zetas , Los Mazatlecos

descriptions: Infobox lists Sinaloa Cartel as a rival of South Pacific Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Sinaloa Cartel , Gulf Cartel

descriptions: Pagano's Motorcycle Club is listed as an ally of Latin Kings in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Almighty Black P. Stone Nation , Almighty Vice Lord Nation , Bloods , Cártel de Sinaloa , Club de Motociclistas Pagano , Four Corner Hustlers , People Nation

descriptions: Nick Femia, a Winter Hill Gang member, previously belonged to the East Boston Gang, but no direct relationship between the gangs is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: Femia was an enforcer for Joseph Barboza's East Boston Gang

descriptions: San Donà di Piave cartel was rival to another cartel and later placed under Maniero's control.
edges.evidence_quote: The San Donà di Piave cartel, under the leadership of Silvano Maritan, nicknamed "The President", protégé of the confined Cosa Nostra boss Salvatore Contorno, the rivalry with another cartel based in the same area caused a number of violent confrontations and subsequently placed Maritan as capo of the eastern part of the province of Venice, that is until he gave up a percentage of his assets to Maniero.

descriptions: Senator Heflin compares the Klan to the Knights of Columbus in a speech, but no direct relationship is asserted.
edges.evidence_quote: What would you think if it sought to denounce the Knights of Columbus by the convention?

descriptions: Iconoclasta Sect claimed an attack in Athens; ITS claimed responsibility for the same device? The text does not explicitly link them.
edges.evidence_quote: The "Iconoclasta Sect" claimed responsibility for the attack

descriptions: The Corso dei Mille family participated in the ambush that killed Giuseppe Calderone, alongside the Catania family.
edges.evidence_quote: Ignazio Ingrassia, known as 'Boia Cani,' a man of honor from the Corso dei Mille family, closely associated with Michele Greco.

descriptions: The Corso Dei Mille Mafia family aligned with the Corleonesi.
edges.evidence_quote: Filippo Marchese (boss of Corso Dei Mille)

descriptions: The Cartel de los Soles has been allied with FARC-EP dissidents since 2017.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: ... Disidencias de las FARC-EP (desde 2017)

descriptions: The Cartel de los Soles has been allied with dissident FARC groups since 2017.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: ... Disidencias de las FARC-EP (desde 2017)

descriptions: Cartel de los Soles has been allied with Disidencias de las FARC-EP since 2017.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: ... Disidencias de las FARC-EP (desde 2017)

descriptions: Clan del Golfo is in direct conflict with some FARC dissidents.
edges.evidence_quote: el Clan del Golfo también se ha visto distraído por un conflicto directo con las disidencias de las FARC-EP

descriptions: Some FARC dissidents are listed as enemies of Clan del Golfo in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Algunas disidencias de las FARC-EP

descriptions: Some FARC dissidences are listed as enemies of Clan del Golfo in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Algunas disidencias de las FARC-EP

edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Algunas disidencias de las FARC-EP

descriptions: Clan del Golfo started a direct conflict with FARC dissidents called Operation Mil.
edges.evidence_quote: el Clan del Golfo había iniciado un conflicto directo con los disidentes de las FARC llamado Operación Mil

descriptions: Clan del Golfo lists some FARC dissidents as enemies.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Algunas disidencias de las FARC-EP

descriptions: Clan del Golfo considers some FARC-EP dissidents enemies according to infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Algunas disidencias de las FARC-EP

descriptions: Clan del Golfo shares drug trafficking scenario with Disidencias de las FARC-EP.
edges.evidence_quote: También con otros grupos al margen de la ley como las Disidencias de las FARC-EP

descriptions: Clan del Golfo had links with FARC-EP dissidents in drug processing and trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Según varios informes del Gobierno, el grupo paramilitar mantenía nexos con la guerrilla desmovilizada de las FARC-EP , en el procesamiento y el tráfico de drogas.

descriptions: Clan del Golfo shares the drug trafficking scene with Disidencias de las FARC-EP.
edges.evidence_quote: También con otros grupos al margen de la ley como las Disidencias de las FARC-EP

descriptions: Infobox lists some FARC-EP dissidences as allies of Clan del Golfo.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: ... Algunas disidencias de las FARC-EP .

descriptions: Clan del Golfo shares the drug trafficking scenario with FARC dissidents.
edges.evidence_quote: También con otros grupos al margen de la ley como las Disidencias de las FARC-EP

descriptions: Clan del Golfo has some FARC dissidents as allies.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: ... Algunas disidencias de las FARC-EP .

descriptions: Los Caparrapos are possibly allied with FARC dissidents against Clan del Golfo.
edges.evidence_quote: Están posiblemente aliados con el ELN y las disidencias de las FARC-EP en su guerra contra el Clan del Golfo

descriptions: Sinaloa buys cocaine from FARC dissidents.
edges.evidence_quote: compra en Colombia a grupos armados criminales como ... las Disidencias de las FARC-EP

descriptions: Tren de Aragua attacked and killed FARC dissidents, starting a war.
edges.evidence_quote: El 3 de agosto de 2021, la banda delincuencial del Tren de Aragua atacó y abatió a dos disidentes de la FARC-EP en el río Arauca a bordo de una canoa, empezando una guerra por el control total del tráfico del río.

descriptions: Listed as enemy in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Disidencias de las FARC-EP

descriptions: Tren de Aragua lists FARC dissidents as enemies.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Disidencias de las FARC-EP

descriptions: Piromalli-Molè clan fought a feud with Ventre-Carlino clan in the 1950s.
edges.evidence_quote: The Piromalli-Molé clan was involved in a bloody feud with the Ventre-Carlino clan in the 1950s

descriptions: Vallelunga opposed the Nardo in the Faida dei boschi.
edges.evidence_quote: contrapporsi allo schieramento formato ... e ai Nardo di Soriano

descriptions: People's Mujahedin of Iran is listed as an opponent of PMF.

descriptions: People's Mujahedin of Iran is listed as a non-state opponent of PMF.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: State opponents Israel, United States, Saudi Arabia, Kuwait, Iraq (sometimes), Non-state opponents Islamic State of Iraq and the Levant, GMCIR, Army of the Men of the Naqshbandi Order, Al-Nusra Front, Free Syrian Army, Islamic Front, White Flags, Ansar al-Islam, People's Mujahedin of Iran

descriptions: People's Mujahedin of Iran is listed as an opponent of PMF in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... People's Mujahedin of Iran

descriptions: The Outlaws are affiliated with the Menard Brotherhood.
edges.evidence_quote: The Outlaws are also affiliated with the Menard Brotherhood, a "prison biker gang" operating in the Illinois state prison system.

descriptions: Ghetto Brothers called a peace meeting attended by Royal Javelins.
edges.evidence_quote: It took place on December 8, 1971, and was attended by two hundred representatives from dozens of Bronx gangs, including the Black Pearls, Black Spades, Dirty Dozens, Dutchmen, Latin Spades, Liberated Panthers, Magnificent Seven, Peacemakers, Royal Javelins, Savage Skulls, Seven Immortals, Turbans, and Young Sinners, together with police and city officials.

descriptions: The remnants of Perna-Cicero-Pranno and Pino-Sena united.
edges.evidence_quote: Attualmente i Perna dominano l'area e si sono uniti a queste due 'ndrine ciò che rimaneva dei Perna-Cicero-Pranno e dei Pino-Sena.

descriptions: OFB members Headie One and RV were originally in Star Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: They were both originally rappers in Star Gang, a road rap group from the 2000s and an offshoot group from the Tottenham Mandem gang.

descriptions: Members of Star Gang formed OFB.
edges.evidence_quote: Two members of Star Gang, Headz (now known as Headie One ) and Young RV (now known as RV ), later became prominent in the UK drill scene and formed part of the UK drill collective OFB (Original Farm Boys).

descriptions: OFB is preceded by Star Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: OFB (Original Farm Boys) is the current gang associated with the Broadwater Farm Estate. They were preceded by Star Gang

descriptions: Star Gang is an offshoot group from Tottenham Mandem.
edges.evidence_quote: They were both originally rappers in Star Gang, a road rap group from the 2000s and an offshoot group from the Tottenham Mandem gang.

descriptions: Star Gang listed as an ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Broadwater Farm Posse, Burger Bar Boys, Causeway Gang, Edmonton Firm (also known as The Firm, Edmonton Mandem, or EMD), Star Gang

descriptions: Infobox lists Star Gang as ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Star Gang

descriptions: Older TMD members used the name Star Gang, indicating a splinter or faction.
edges.evidence_quote: whereas some older members began to use the name 'Star Gang'

descriptions: Star Gang was created by older members of TMD.
edges.evidence_quote: 'Star Gang' was also formed during this period, created by older members of TMD.

descriptions: Kinfolk are rivals of the Bandidos.
edges.evidence_quote: the Kinfolk

descriptions: Kinfolk member murdered Bandidos chapter president, leading to ongoing conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Javier Gonzalez, vice-president of the Kinfolk's El Paso chapter, was sentenced to fifty-six years in prison in January 2019 after he was convicted of murdering Bandidos El Paso chapter president Juan "Compa" Martinez Jr., who was shot seven times on July 30, 2017, and died on August 3.

'Ndrina La Maggiore.description: A powerful 'ndrina (clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in San Luca, Calabria, Italy. Founded by the Nirta brothers in the late 19th century, it is considered one of the most influential 'ndrine historically. Active in drug trafficking, particularly heroin and cocaine, with operations in northern Italy and Europe. The clan has been implicated in high-profile events such as the kidnapping of Aldo Moro.

descriptions: Members of these three 'ndrine were targeted together in the same police operation, but no direct relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 19 febbraio 2018 si concludono le operazioni "Martingala" e "Vello d'oro" ... nei confronti di presunti affiliati ai Nirta (Scalzone), degli Araniti e dei Piromalli

descriptions: Nirta intervened to broker peace between Condello and De Stefano.
edges.evidence_quote: La pax mafiosa è stata raggiunta solo con l'intervento di Cosa nostra , delle famiglie mafiose di New York , dalla cosca dei Nirta (La Maggiore) di San Luca e dagli Alvaro di Sinopoli

descriptions: La Maggiore is allied with Codispoti, with familial ties.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati dei Codispoti (con cui hanno dei legami parentali)

descriptions: La Maggiore is allied with Giorgi.
edges.evidence_quote: dei Giorgi e dei Romeo .

descriptions: After 1995, Nirta versu allied with the Scalzone (La Maggiore).
edges.evidence_quote: i Giorgi detti boviciano , e i Nirta versu .

descriptions: La Maggiore is allied with Vottari (also known as Frunzu or Pelle).
edges.evidence_quote: dei Vottari , detti Frunzu e cioè i Pelle

descriptions: After 1995, Strangio allied with the Scalzone (La Maggiore).
edges.evidence_quote: Invece si alleano con i Scalzone gli Strangio , detti janchi, e quelli detti barbari

descriptions: La Maggiore is distinct from Nirta-Strangio, but both are mentioned as separate entities.
edges.evidence_quote: La Maggiore o Scalzone si distingue dai Nirta-Strangio di San Luca , alleati dei Giorgi .

descriptions: La Maggiore is allied with Romeo.
edges.evidence_quote: dei Giorgi e dei Romeo .

descriptions: Cosa Nostra approached La Maggiore to obtain explosives for the Capaci bombing.
edges.evidence_quote: i boss di Cosa nostra si rivolsero alla 'ndrina dei fratelli Nirta (La Maggiore) per reperire l'esplosivo

descriptions: Cosa Nostra bought weapons from La Maggiore, with close ties to the Corleonesi.
edges.evidence_quote: Tramite la 'ndrangheta , la cosca dei fratelli Nirta di San Luca , abbiamo acquistato delle armi, due mitra, due machine-pistole ed un lanciamissili.

descriptions: Mammoliti, Nirta Scalzone, and Raso were part of the same criminal group in Aosta.
edges.evidence_quote: arrestate 16 persone di un sodalizio operanti come Locale di Aosta almeno dal 2014 e riconducibili ai Nirta Scalzone , ai Raso e ai Mammoliti

descriptions: Romeo is allied with Nirta.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati con le cosche dei Nirta ( La Maggiore ) e dei Pelle .

descriptions: The Strangio are suspected of involvement in ship sinkings together with the Nirta (La Maggiore).
edges.evidence_quote: I Nirta-Strangio sono sospettati di aver avuto a che fare con gli affondamenti di navi ... insieme ai ... Nirta (La Maggiore)

descriptions: Nirta helped De Stefano establish peace.
edges.evidence_quote: Orazio De Stefano riesce a ristabilire la pax mafiosa grazie all'intervento della cosca "amica" dei Nirta (La Maggiore) di San Luca.

descriptions: Antonio Nirta acted as guarantor for the De Stefano clan during peace negotiations.
edges.evidence_quote: Antonio Nirta per i De Stefano

descriptions: Byrd Gang has feuded and clashed with 3-N-G gang, including a shooting at Mardi Gras parade.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang has feuded with the 3-N-G gang for years, clashing with them during the 2009 Mardi Gras parade where seven people were shot, including a baby.

descriptions: Huỳnh Tỳ's triad initiated Năm Cam into the criminal underworld.
edges.evidence_quote: Văn Cam was first initiated into the criminal underworld by Huỳnh Tỳ, a major player in the triads of Saigon at the time.

descriptions: Sin City Deciples is reportedly allied with Dahuru MC.
edges.evidence_quote: The club is reportedly allied with the Dahuru MC and Mixbreed MC.

descriptions: Wanted Bikers were affiliated with Bandidos but sought to switch to Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: In June 1991, the clubhouse of the Wanted Bikers, a club in Haute-Savoie affiliated to the Bandidos but wishing to instead begin an association with the Hells Angels, was shot at and the motorcycles parked outside were destroyed.

Comando Vermelho.description: One of the two largest criminal organizations in Brazil, alongside the Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC). Founded in 1979 at the Cândido Mendes prison on Ilha Grande, Rio de Janeiro. Engages in drug trafficking, organized crime, and operates in multiple Brazilian states and neighboring countries. Known for its 'caixa comum' (common fund) financed by member contributions.

descriptions: ADA and Comando Vermelho are rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang's main rivals are Comando Vermelho and Terceiro Comando Puro.

descriptions: The infobox lists Comando Vermelho as a rival of ADA.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: Terceiro Comando Puro , Comando Vermelho

descriptions: Rogério 157 switched from ADA to Comando Vermelho, leading to CV taking over Rocinha.
edges.evidence_quote: Posteriormente, com Rogério 157 migrando para o Comando Vermelho, a comunidade passou a ser dominada por essa facção, encerrando o domínio do ADA no local.

descriptions: Celsinho of ADA made an agreement with Comando Vermelho leader Doca to recover lost territories.
edges.evidence_quote: Celsinho teria articulado um acordo com Edgar Alves de Andrade, o Doca , uma das lideranças do Comando Vermelho, e com o miliciano André Costa Bastos, conhecido como Boto, para tentar recuperar áreas da zona oeste que haviam sido perdidas pelo ADA.

descriptions: Amigos dos Amigos was formed by an expelled member of Comando Vermelho.
edges.evidence_quote: It began in 1998 when a member of § Comando Vermelho was expelled from the organization for ordering the assassination of another member.

descriptions: Bala na Cara formed an alliance with Comando Vermelho for drug trafficking and other illicit activities.
edges.evidence_quote: Nos últimos anos, a Bala na Cara estreitou laços com o Comando Vermelho (CV) , uma das maiores organizações criminosas do Brasil, estabelecendo um vínculo de aliança no tráfico de drogas e em outras atividades ilícitas.

descriptions: Bonde do Maluco considers Comando Vermelho a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Its rivals include the Comando Vermelho (CV) and Katiara within the Bahian capital

descriptions: Bonde do Maluco has Comando Vermelho as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Tem como rivais o Comando Vermelho (CV)

descriptions: Bonde dos 13 is in conflict with Comando Vermelho.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: CV

descriptions: Bonde dos 40 entered a war with Comando Vermelho in 2019.
edges.evidence_quote: It was also reported that same year that it entered into a war with Comando Vermelho to dominate the Vila Conceição neighborhood in southern São Luís.

descriptions: Infobox lists Comando Vermelho as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Primeiro Comando da Capital , Comando Vermelho

descriptions: B40 and CV are rivals for territory in São Luís.
edges.evidence_quote: enquanto outros 20% são do rival Comando Vermelho

descriptions: B40 lists CV as a rival in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: PCC , CV

descriptions: Bonde dos 40 formed an alliance with Comando Vermelho.
edges.evidence_quote: they began operating both inside and outside prisons in the interior of Maranhão, even forming alliances with Comando Vermelho (CV) and Amigos dos Amigos (ADA).

descriptions: Comando Vermelho initiated a conflict with Brazilian militias in 2006.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2006, the drug trafficking network Comando Vermelho started a conflict against the militias.

descriptions: Comando Classe A broke away from Comando Vermelho, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: rompendo com o Comando Vermelho e formando uma aliança com o PCC

descriptions: CCA and PCC fought against CV in a prison rebellion.
edges.evidence_quote: O confronto foi entre membros do CCA/PCC e o CV

descriptions: Comando Vermelho has fought in conflicts with ADA.
edges.evidence_quote: It has fought in several small-scale conflicts with rival gangs such as ... Amigos dos Amigos (ADA)

descriptions: Comando Vermelho lists ADA as a rival in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ... Amigos dos Amigos

descriptions: Amigos dos Amigos emerged as a splinter group from Comando Vermelho.
edges.evidence_quote: The group's decentralized leadership structure and disputes over profits prompted infighting, causing splinter groups such as the Terceiro Comando and Amigos dos Amigos to emerge.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Primeiro Grupo Catarinense, Bala na Cara

descriptions: Comando Vermelho has violently fought with Border Command in the Amazon region.
edges.evidence_quote: the CV, PCC, Familia do Norte, and Colombian militia groups including the Border Command and the Carolina Ramirez Front have violently fought

descriptions: Comando Vermelho has violently fought with Carolina Ramirez Front in the Amazon region.
edges.evidence_quote: the CV, PCC, Familia do Norte, and Colombian militia groups including the Border Command and the Carolina Ramirez Front have violently fought

descriptions: Comando Vermelho may have also originated as a dissidence from Falange Jacaré.
edges.evidence_quote: o Terceiro Comando assim como o Comando Vermelho pode ter sido criado de uma dissidência de uma das falanges que controlavam a prisão de Ilha Grande, provavelmente a Falange Jacaré

edges.evidence_quote: O Comando Vermelho historicamente tinha uma aliança com a facção Família do Norte , que foi rompida em 2019.

descriptions: Comando Vermelho has fought in conflicts with PCC.
edges.evidence_quote: It has fought in several small-scale conflicts with rival gangs such as Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC)

descriptions: After the truce broke down, CV and PCC engaged in violent clashes.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2016, a 20-year truce between the Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC), a rival organization based in São Paulo, and the CV broke down, sparking violent clashes.

descriptions: Comando Vermelho lists PCC as a rival in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Primeiro Comando da Capital

descriptions: Comando Vermelho is in conflict with Primeiro Comando da Capital.
edges.evidence_quote: turf wars against rival criminal organizations, such as § Primeiro Comando da Capital

descriptions: PCC's dominance in the border area forces Comando Vermelho to seek alternative trafficking routes, indicating rivalry.
edges.evidence_quote: O domínio do Primeiro Comando da Capital na fronteira com o Paraguai força o Comando Vermelho a buscar rotas alternativas de tráfico.

descriptions: A 20-year truce between CV and PCC broke down in 2016, leading to violent clashes.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2016, a 20-year truce between the Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC), a rival organization based in São Paulo, and the CV broke down, sparking violent clashes.

descriptions: Comando Vermelho and PCC are the two largest criminal organizations in Brazil, mentioned together as counterparts.
edges.evidence_quote: Comando Vermelho Rogério Lemgruber ( CVRL ), mais conhecido como Comando Vermelho ( CV ), é uma das duas maiores organizações criminosas do Brasil , ao lado do Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC).

descriptions: Both Comando Vermelho and PCC were declared narcoterrorist organizations by Argentina.
edges.evidence_quote: Em 29 de outubro de 2025, a ministra da Segurança, Patricia Bullrich , informou que ambas foram incluídas no Registro de Pessoas e Entidades Ligadas a Atos de Terrorismo (Repet)

descriptions: Comando Vermelho had business dealings with FARC, led by Fernandinho Beira-Mar.
edges.evidence_quote: Beira-Mar is an imprisoned senior leader who led the CV's business dealings with the FARC, the Colombian guerrilla group that entered the cocaine trade following the death of Pablo Escobar.

descriptions: CV took territories from FDN in February 2020, indicating conflict.

descriptions: FDN and CV were allies, with CV supporting FDN's war against PCC in 2016.

descriptions: FDN and CV broke their alliance in 2018 due to personal reasons.

descriptions: GDE and CV are in conflict over drug sales points.

descriptions: Infobox lists CV as rival of GDE.

descriptions: GDE had a peace pact with CV that was broken.

descriptions: PCC and CV were allied under Geleião and Cesinha.

Cowboy Mafia.description: The Cowboy Mafia was a group of marijuana smugglers operating in the United States during the 1970s, primarily in Texas. They imported over 106 tons of marijuana from Colombia using shrimp boats, transporting it to ranches owned by Rex Cauble. The group was arrested in 1978, and 26 members were convicted in 1979. Rex Cauble, considered the headman, was sentenced to 95 years in prison.

Tehreek-e-Taliban Pakistan.description: Deobandi jihadist militant organization primarily operating along the Afghanistan-Pakistan border. Founded by Baitullah Mehsud in 2007, it seeks to overthrow the Pakistani government and establish an Islamic state. Designated as a terrorist group by the UN and Pakistan, it has carried out numerous suicide bombings and attacks. Led by Noor Wali Mehsud since 2018, the group underwent reorganization in 2020, merging several factions.

descriptions: TTP sent fighters to Syria to fight alongside Ahrar al-Sham.

Banda della Comasina.description: Italian criminal group active in the 1970s in robberies, kidnappings, and weapons trafficking in the Comasina area of northern Milan. Controlled by Renato Vallanzasca, it was often at odds with the Turatello Crew. The group's most famous action was the kidnapping of Emanuela Trapani. It was active until 1987.

descriptions: The Banda della Comasina was often in conflict with the Turatello Crew.
edges.evidence_quote: it was often at odds with the band of Francis Turatello

descriptions: The text states they developed in the same years and criminal contexts, but no direct relationship is asserted.
edges.evidence_quote: Sviluppatasi negli stessi anni e negli stessi contesti criminali da cui nacquero a Roma la Banda della Magliana e a Milano la Banda della Comasina

descriptions: Initially in a gang war, the two groups later formed an alliance after their leaders reconciled in prison.
edges.evidence_quote: The Turatello Crew and Banda della Comasina had been in the middle of a gang war with each other when their leaders, Vallanzasca and Turatello, were incarcerated in the same prison, reconciling and bonding there. The newly forged alliance between the two crime groups only increased their influence and power in the Milan underworld.

descriptions: Hai San absorbed the Wah Sang society around 1854.
edges.evidence_quote: Bolton et al. suggest that the Hai San society ... by around 1854 had absorbed the Wah Sang society

descriptions: Montreal Hells Angels conspired with Cali Cartel and Rizzuto family to smuggle cocaine.
edges.evidence_quote: Pierre Rodrigue and David Rouleau, two Canadian Hells Angels from the Sherbrooke chapter, were arrested by British police in London at the request of the Royal Canadian Mounted Police (RCMP) in February 1995 before being extradited to Canada and sentenced to fourteen years' imprisonment for conspiring to smuggle 558 kilograms of cocaine into the UK in a scheme also involving the Rizzuto crime family and the Cali Cartel.

descriptions: Montreal chapter shipped cocaine to London chapter.
edges.evidence_quote: The British Hells Angels have a close association with the Canadian Hells Angels, and the Angels' Montreal chapter was involved in shipping cocaine to the Angels' London chapter.

descriptions: Montreal Hells Angels conspired with Rizzuto family and Cali Cartel to smuggle cocaine.
edges.evidence_quote: Pierre Rodrigue and David Rouleau, two Canadian Hells Angels from the Sherbrooke chapter, were arrested by British police in London at the request of the Royal Canadian Mounted Police (RCMP) in February 1995 before being extradited to Canada and sentenced to fourteen years' imprisonment for conspiring to smuggle 558 kilograms of cocaine into the UK in a scheme also involving the Rizzuto crime family and the Cali Cartel.

descriptions: Waray-Abuyog Gang has alliances with Sudoy-Sudoy Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: They have also been documented making alliances with other Waray gangs, most notably the Sudoy-Sudoy Gang.

Clan Sarno.description: The Clan Sarno was a Camorra criminal organization based in Naples, Italy, led by the Sarno brothers: Ciro, Vincenzo, Luciano, Giuseppe, and Pasquale. It formed in the early 1980s after the dissolution of the Nuova Famiglia groups, engaging in conflicts with the Alleanza di Secondigliano and later joining the Misso-Mazzarella-Sarno cartel. The clan was involved in territorial disputes and camorra wars, particularly against the De Luca Bossa clan.

descriptions: The Aprea-Cuccaro clan opposed the Sarno clan.
edges.evidence_quote: The goal was to resist the pressure exerted by the Mazzarella clan and the Sarno clan.

descriptions: Giovanni Aprea worked for the Sarno clan early in his career.
edges.evidence_quote: Giovanni Aprea, known as ' e curtiello , a leading figure of the clan, began the criminal career working for Ciro Sarno , then a powerful boss of the Sarno clan from Ponticelli.

descriptions: The Sarno clan is a subgroup of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: The Camorra's organizational structure is divided into individual groups called 'clans'.

descriptions: Splinter groups of Clan Sarno supported Clan Marfella.
edges.evidence_quote: dagli scissionisti del clan Sarno di Ponticelli

descriptions: Misso gathered the Mazzarella and Sarno clan leaders around him to oppose the Alleanza di Secondigliano.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel breve periodo in cui è tornato in libertà Misso avrebbe raccolto intorno al proprio gruppo i capiclan dei Mazzarella e dei Sarno, che avevano chiare ragioni di odio nei confronti dell'Alleanza di Secondigliano

descriptions: Ricci are allies of Sarno.
edges.evidence_quote: Nei Quartieri Spagnoli, in seguito alla caduta dei clan Di Biasi e Russo, è emerso il gruppo dei Ricci, facente capo al pregiudicato Enrico Ricci, ex commerciante, ed ai suoi due figli, alleati dei Sarno di Ponticelli.

descriptions: Clan Sarno was at war with the Anastasio family.
edges.evidence_quote: entrarono in guerra con le famiglie locali: i Veneruso, gli Anastasio e i Panico

descriptions: Clan Sarno was associated with the Arlistico-Terracciano-Orefice clan, as its regent was arrested in a sweep targeting Sarno.
edges.evidence_quote: Luisa Terracciano (48), ritenuta la reggente del clan Arlistico-Terracciano-Orefice

descriptions: Clan Sarno allied with Misso and Mazzarella to form a cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: si unì successivamente alle famiglie Mazzarella e Misso formando il cartello criminale cosiddetto: Misso-Mazzarella-Sarno

descriptions: Clan Sarno was at war with the Panico family.
edges.evidence_quote: entrarono in guerra con le famiglie locali: i Veneruso, gli Anastasio e i Panico

descriptions: Clan Sarno allied with the Ricci clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Le alleanze dei Sarno compresero il clan Ricci sui Quartieri Spagnoli

descriptions: Sarno and De Luca Bossa fought a faida, culminating in the 1998 Ponticelli car bomb.
edges.evidence_quote: faida tra i Sarno e i De Luca Bossa : questa faida può essere considerata come una sorta di "spin-off" della faida tra i Misso e l' Alleanza di Secondigliano

descriptions: Clan Sarno was at war with the De Luca Bossa clan.
edges.evidence_quote: contro il clan De Luca Bossa

descriptions: Clan Sarno broke ties and went to war with the Mazzarella clan.
edges.evidence_quote: spezzare i rapporti con il clan Mazzarella. Nelle settimane seguenti, c'è stata una veloce quanto violenta guerra di predominio del territorio.

descriptions: Clan Sarno allied with Mazzarella and Misso to form a cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: si unì successivamente alle famiglie Mazzarella e Misso formando il cartello criminale cosiddetto: Misso-Mazzarella-Sarno

descriptions: Clan Sarno emerged after the threat of NCO ended.
edges.evidence_quote: non essendoci più la minaccia della Nuova Camorra Organizzata di Raffaele Cutolo

descriptions: Clan Sarno formed after the dissolution of Nuova Famiglia groups.
edges.evidence_quote: dopo la dissoluzione dei gruppi che facevano capo alla Nuova Famiglia

descriptions: Clan Sarno had a significant alliance with the Amato-Pagano clan.
edges.evidence_quote: tessere una tela molto importante con gli Amato-Pagano

descriptions: Clan Sarno was at war with the Alleanza di Secondigliano.
edges.evidence_quote: entrò prima in guerra con i clan dell' Alleanza di Secondigliano

descriptions: Clan Sarno was at war with the Veneruso family.
edges.evidence_quote: entrarono in guerra con le famiglie locali: i Veneruso, gli Anastasio e i Panico

descriptions: De Luca Bossa clan fought a bloody war against the Sarno clan.
edges.evidence_quote: The clan was founded by Antonio De Luca Bossa, known as ‘O sicco , in the 1990s, and was famous for the bloody war against the once powerful Sarno clan.

descriptions: De Luca Bossa clan fought a war with Sarno clan for territorial control.
edges.evidence_quote: In the early 90s, Antonio became a trusted member of the Sarno clan, however, he decided to create his own clan, which ended in a bloody war between the then newly created clan and the Sarnos for the control of the territory.

descriptions: De Luca Bossa was hostile to the cartel formed by Fusco-Ponticelli and Sarno.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan De Luca Bossa fu ostile al cartello formato dai clan Fusco-Ponticelli e Sarno.

descriptions: Mazzarella clan allied with Misso and Sarno clans in the Misso-Mazzarella-Sarno alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: the Mazzarellas formed a strong alliance with the Misso and Sarno clans, called Misso-Mazzarella-Sarno

descriptions: Mazzarella incorporated Sarno into a cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel corso degli anni la famiglia di Vincenzo Mazzarella ha inglobato altri clan come i Misso e i Sarno formando così uno dei cartelli più influenti dell'epoca: i Misso-Mazzarella-Sarno

descriptions: Ciro Sarno, after leaving NCO, founded the Sarno clan.
edges.evidence_quote: diede vita, con i fratelli, al clan Sarno

Pirus.description: The Pirus are a subset of the Bloods gang alliance, founded in 1969 in Compton, California by Sylvester Scott and Vincent Owens. They are primarily African American and engage in drug trafficking, robbery, extortion, and murder. The Pirus formed as a rival to the Crips and later became part of the larger Bloods alliance. They remain active as of the present.

descriptions: Big Circle Gang has a rivalry with Piru Street Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Piru Street Boys

descriptions: Bloods are allied with Pirus.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Pirus

descriptions: Pirus founded the Bloods alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: This alliance became the Bloods. The Pirus are therefore considered the founders of the Bloods.

descriptions: Piru Street Boys are the original faction of the Bloods.
edges.evidence_quote: The Bloods' original faction, the Piru Street Boys or simply Pirus, was formed by student Sylvester Scott

descriptions: Piru Street Boys later feuded with Crips, leading to violence.
edges.evidence_quote: After two years of peace, a feud began between the Pirus and the other Crip sets. It later turned violent as gang warfare ensued between former allies.

descriptions: Piru Street Boys originally associated with Crips as a set.
edges.evidence_quote: By 1971, a gang on Piru Street in Compton, California , known as the Piru Street Boys , formed and associated itself with the Crips as a set.

descriptions: Mob Piru is a set within the Piru gang alliance, which originated from Piru Street Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: The Mob Piru ... is a 'set' of the Piru gang alliance

descriptions: The Pirus allied with the Bishops to form the Bloods.
edges.evidence_quote: the 300 Playboy Piru Bloods formed an alliance with other smaller street gangs such as the Brims, Bishops and Denver Lanes, which also opposed the Crips. This alliance became known as the Bloods

descriptions: Piru Street Boys formed the Bloods alliance with other gangs.
edges.evidence_quote: by 1972, the Piru Street Boys formed an alliance with other smaller street gangs such as the Brims, Bishops and Denver Lanes, which also opposed the Crips. This alliance became known as the Bloods

descriptions: The Pirus are a subset of the Bloods alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: The Pirus ( / ˈ p aɪ . r uː / ⓘ ) are a subset of the larger Bloods gang alliance

descriptions: The Pirus allied with the Brims to form the Bloods.
edges.evidence_quote: the 300 Playboy Piru Bloods formed an alliance with other smaller street gangs such as the Brims, Bishops and Denver Lanes, which also opposed the Crips. This alliance became known as the Bloods

descriptions: Some sources claim Piru Street Boys were victimized by the Crips, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: the Piru Street Boys were victimized by the Crips

descriptions: The Pirus are rivals of the Crips.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Crips

descriptions: Piru Street Boys were initially associated with the Crips.
edges.evidence_quote: the Piru Street Boys were initially associated with the Crips

descriptions: The Pirus allied with the Denver Lanes to form the Bloods.
edges.evidence_quote: the 300 Playboy Piru Bloods formed an alliance with other smaller street gangs such as the Brims, Bishops and Denver Lanes, which also opposed the Crips. This alliance became known as the Bloods

descriptions: The Pirus are allied with the Juggalos according to the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bloods , Juggalos

descriptions: Pirus is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: United Blood Nation, Pirus, MS13(Localized Alliances)
